industry_regulations.label: Applicable regulations (HIPAA, PCI-DSS, SOX, GDPR, APRA, etc.)

audit_requirements.label: Audit logging, retention, and reporting requirements

ai_policy.label: Org policies on AI/LLM usage and responsible AI frameworks

decisions_requiring_humans.label: Decisions that cannot be delegated to an agent

approval_workflows.label: What requires human sign-off before execution?

escalation_paths.label: When should the agent hand off to a human?

override_mechanisms.label: How can humans override agent decisions?
override_mechanisms.value: Not specified in document. Will need: AP Team Lead dashboard to review/override agent decisions, ability to manually post invoices bypassing agent, audit log of all overrides. SAP retains ability to manually post invoices as fallback.

confidence_thresholds.label: At what confidence level should the agent escalate?

bias_fairness.label: Fairness concerns in the process (lending, hiring, claims, etc.)

transparency_requirements.label: Must end users know they are interacting with an agent?

explainability.label: Must the agent explain its reasoning? To whom?

change_appetite.label: Org readiness for AI-driven process change

training_needs.label: Who needs to learn new workflows?

support_model.label: Who supports the agents in production?

risk_tolerance.label: Acceptable failure rate and consequence of agent errors

rollback_plan.label: Can the org revert to the manual process if needed?
rollback_plan.value: Yes — manual SAP data entry process can be resumed if needed. However, with 3 FTEs reducing via attrition, rollback capacity diminishes over time. Phased rollout recommended to maintain manual fallback during transition. Rollback plan not formally documented.
